description: T1/T2 기본 파이프라인 완성 후 다음 레벨 로드맵 — 15+N 확장 가능
prerequisite: T1 463 tok/s PASS + T2 7.02h/1B PASS (2026-04-11 ossified)
h100_quota_ref: shared/roadmaps/p5_zeta.json#goal — ML 로드맵 작업은 H100 1대 추가 가능 (기본 2대 + ML 1대 = 총 3대까지 자동 발사 허용)

auto_push_policy.description: ML 로드맵 항목 완료 시 해당 산출물을 자동 git commit + push — anima docker가 git pull hexa-lang으로 다음 pod 재시작 시 자동 반영
auto_push_policy.exclude: 무관 WIP (self/build_c.hexa, self/codegen_c2.hexa, self/runtime.c, self/ml/distributed*.hexa 수정분 등 이번 사이클 외 변경)
auto_push_policy.batch_mode: 동시 완료된 다수 항목은 한 commit으로 묶어서 push (제목: 'ml: #A/#B/... 구현 (N tests PASS)')
auto_push_policy.commit_msg_template:
ml: #{id} {name} 구현 ({tests_passed} tests PASS)

- self/ml/{file}.hexa
- self/test_{file}.hexa
- SSOT id={id} todo→done
auto_push_policy.no_confirm: 자동 실행, 사용자 질의 없음 (GO 모드/ml go 경로 포함)
auto_push_policy.blocking: pre-commit hook 실패 시 원인 고치고 재시도. --no-verify 금지. L0 가드는 shared/rules/lockdown.json 준수. hook 실패 후 --amend 금지 (새 commit 생성)
auto_push_policy.docker_reflect: push → runpodctl pod 재시작 또는 신규 pod 생성 시 entrypoint_steps의 'git pull hexa-lang'이 자동 pull → anima/training이 import 'ml/{name}.hexa'로 즉시 사용 가능

items.name: PagedAttention
items.summary: Block table + page allocator (free list) + copy-on-write fork + paged attention forward (online softmax). 20 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Speculative Decoding

items.name: SSM/Mamba
items.summary: S4 block (A,B,C,D state space) + ZOH discretization + selective scan (input-dependent delta gating) + conv1d causal + Mamba block (conv->SSM->gate) + MambaBlock struct. 14 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Vision Transformer
items.summary: Patch embedding + positional embedding + ViT encoder (multi-head self-attention + FFN + LayerNorm + residual) + CLS token classification + cosine similarity + CLIP contrastive loss (bidirectional) + contrastive matrix. 12 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: 모델 머징
items.summary: TIES (magnitude trim + sign elect + weighted merge) + DARE (random drop + rescale + merge) + SLERP (spherical linear interpolation via acos/sin) + vector_norm/dot. 12 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Function Calling

items.name: Knowledge Distillation
items.summary: Temperature-scaled softmax + KL divergence + cross entropy + combined distill_loss (alpha*T^2*KL + (1-alpha)*CE) + teacher/student forward + batch gradient train step. 12 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Pruning
items.summary: Magnitude pruning (abs threshold) + structured pruning (L1 norm row removal) + compute_sparsity + cubic sparsity schedule + fine-tune step (sparsity-preserving SGD) + iterative pruning. 12 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Hyperparameter Search
items.summary: Grid search (all combos) + random search (bounded sampling) + Bayesian optimization (RBF kernel GP + EI acquisition) + trial runner with early stopping. 12 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: 안전장치

items.name: Semantic Cache
items.summary: Cosine similarity cache + configurable threshold + LRU eviction (tick-based) + hit/miss stats + cache_clear/remove. 14 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: 벤치마크 스위트
items.summary: MMLU few-shot evaluator + HumanEval pass@k(1,5,10) + MT-Bench multi-turn word-overlap scorer + unified ASCII/JSONL report. 22 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: GQA/MQA Attention

items.name: Continuous Batching
items.summary: Request queue + iteration-level scheduling + dynamic slot fill/evict + per-request KV state + run_until_done + scheduler_stats. 15 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Tensor Parallelism
items.summary: 2-way Megatron-LM TP (pure CPU simulation, rank=배열 인덱스): column/row split+unsplit, all_reduce_sum/all_gather_col/all_gather_row/reduce_scatter_row/broadcast collectives, column-parallel linear forward+backward (X broadcast -> 샤드 matmul -> all-gather / grad_X all-reduce + grad_W per-shard), row-parallel linear forward+backward (X col-split -> 샤드 matmul -> all-reduce-sum / grad_X per-shard + grad_W per-shard), 2-way TP attention (QKV column-parallel heads/rank + MHA 로컬 계산 + output row-parallel all-reduce), FFN col->row composition. 48 tests ALL PASS — single-GEMM/single-GPU 기준값과 1e-6 이내 bit-level 일치.

items.name: Mixed Precision Training
items.summary: FP16 sim forward/backward + FP32 master weights + dynamic loss scaling (backoff/growth) + overflow detection. 20 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Activation Checkpointing

items.summary: Checkpoint boundary + selective recompute + memory_saved_ratio + compute_overhead_ratio. 18 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Quantization-Aware Training

items.name: Multi-Agent Orchestration
items.summary: Agent registry + keyword task router + top-N routing + direct/broadcast messaging + pub/sub topics + majority/weighted consensus + run_task. 32 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Speech/Audio (Whisper식)
items.summary: Mel spectrogram (DFT + mel filterbank + log power) + audio encoder (conv1d + transformer blocks) + CTC greedy/beam decode + Griffin-Lim vocoder + end-to-end pipeline. 22 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Continual Learning
items.description: 이전 지식 유지하며 새 데이터 학습
items.summary: EWC (Fisher information + penalty) + SI (online omega accumulation) + replay buffer (circular + sampling) + task boundary detection (spike + windowed) + continual_train_step. 24 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Neural Architecture Search
items.summary: Search space definition + random/evolutionary architecture sampling + mutation/crossover + FLOPs/accuracy evaluator + Pareto front (non-dominated sort) + run_evolution + run_random_search. 31 tests ALL PASS.

items.summary: Accumulator create/accumulate/should_step/get_accumulated/reset + effective_batch_size + sync timing. 27 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Tokenizer Training
items.summary: BPE training from scratch: count_pairs + merge_pair + train_bpe (iterative most-frequent merge) + encode/decode roundtrip + [PAD]/[UNK]/[BOS]/[EOS] special tokens + save/load vocab. 21 tests ALL PASS.

items.summary: Client selection (fraction sampling) + local SGD train + FedAvg weighted aggregation + gradient clipping + Gaussian DP noise + privacy budget (epsilon) + run_federation_round/run_federation. 27 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: KV-Cache Compression
items.summary: INT8 symmetric quantization + dequantization + attention-based token importance scoring (softmax) + multi-head importance + eviction policy (argmin least important) + compressed cache forward + compression ratio. 15 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Dynamic Early Exit

items.summary: Sigmoid/softmax/entropy confidence estimators + threshold-based early exit + layer skip + full forward baseline + batch exit distribution + avg layers used + speedup calc. 15 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Adapter Fusion
items.summary: Adapter registry (name->weights CRUD) + attention-based fusion (query*key softmax) + hard/soft task routing + weighted merge + single/fused forward. 15 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Prefix Caching

items.name: Prompt Compression

items.name: Curriculum Learning
items.summary: Difficulty scorer (loss-based) + normalize (min-max) + pacing (linear/sqrt/step) + data scheduler (easy-first via competence) + rank_difficulty + anti-curriculum + curriculum_train_step. 21 tests ALL PASS.

items.summary: Shared encoder (ReLU linear) + task-specific heads + loss balancing (fixed ratio + uncertainty weighting) + task routing (argmax router) + MSE loss + numerical gradient train step. 15 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: RLAIF
items.summary: AI judge prompt + multi-criteria scoring + generate_preference API + batch pairwise collection + quality filter (margin) + constitutional AI filter + self-play + DPO/RLHF compatible. 19 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Output Watermark
items.summary: Green/red token partition (hash) + logit bias (delta on green) + z-test detection (one-proportion) + watermarked/clean generation + p-value approximation. Kirchenbauer et al. 13 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: CoT Distillation
items.summary: CoT trace collection (split) + step-by-step KL divergence + trace-conditioned loss (alpha*step_KL + (1-alpha)*CE) + distill step + score_reasoning (argmax match) + batch distill. 13 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Embedding Fine-tune
items.summary: InfoNCE contrastive loss + in-batch negatives + triplet loss (anchor/pos/neg) + hard negative mining (top-k similarity) + linear projection fine-tune + similarity matrix + batch losses. 14 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Model Sharding
items.summary: Layer-wise GPU/CPU/disk placement planner + async prefetch simulation + disk mmap save/load/window + sharded forward with auto-offload + memory estimation. 21 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Reward Model
items.summary: Standalone reward head (hidden->scalar) + Bradley-Terry loss (log sigmoid) + preference pair loader + batch BT loss + finite-diff training + rank_by_reward + reward accuracy + margin loss. 14 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Data Deduplication
items.summary: K-shingling + DJB2 hash family + MinHash signature + Jaccard similarity (exact/approx) + LSH banding + candidate pair detection + Union-Find clustering + dedup filter. 15 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Mixture of Depths
items.summary: Token router (sigmoid) + top-k capacity selection + FFN skip connection for non-routed tokens + aux load balance loss + variance loss + capacity schedule + multi-layer MoD forward + FLOP savings. 17 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Ring Attention
items.description: 시퀀스 분할 + 디바이스 간 KV 순환
items.summary: Sequence chunking + ring KV rotation + causal blockwise attention + online softmax merge + ra_ring_attention full pipeline. 22 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Sparse Upcycling
items.summary: Expert replication + noise symmetry breaking + uniform router init + top-k routing + softmax weights + load balance loss + cosine LR schedule + upcycle + finetune step. 17 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: DPO Variants
items.summary: IPO (bounded log-ratio squared loss) + KTO (single-sided sigmoid preference) + ORPO (odds-ratio penalty, no ref model) + combined dispatcher + DPO baseline + gradient + reward margin + accuracy. 19 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Synthetic Data Gen
items.summary: Template create/fill + seed-based variant generation + length/diversity/coherence scoring + quality filter + hash-based dedup + near-dedup Jaccard + full pipeline + quality stats. 20 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Context Distillation
items.summary: Teacher long-context forward + L2-norm importance scoring + position ranking + key extraction + context compression + student short forward + KD loss (alpha*T^2*KL + (1-alpha)*CE) + mean pool. 18 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Pipeline Parallelism
items.summary: 2-stage layer split (balanced halves) + 1F1B scheduler (warmup/steady/cooldown 이벤트 빌더) + forward/backward CPU queue sim + bubble_steps accounting + pp_bubble_ratio/efficiency + grad_accum glue (pp_average_grads/accumulate_into). 29 tests ALL PASS — outputs 정확히 single-model과 수치 일치, B0 F2 순서 스팀 정상.

items.name: ZeRO Optimizer
items.summary: ZeroContext (num_ranks/param_size/stage/params/grads/m_shards/v_shards/grad_shards/param_shards/t) + zo_shard_begin/end/size (uneven split) + zo_scatter/gather (round-trip) + zo_reduce_scatter (sum-then-split, 2-rank CPU 시뮬레이션) + zo_all_gather + zo_adam_update_shard (shard Adam: m/v/param slice 반환, hexa array-by-value 규칙 준수) + zo_step_zero1 (optimizer state shard) + zo_step_zero2 (+ gradient reduce-scatter) + zo_step_zero3 (+ parameter shard, materialize_params 온디맨드) + zo_memory_per_rank/baseline/savings_ratio (4P→2P+2S / P+3S / 4S 계층) + 단일-rank Adam 동치 교차검증. 15 tests ALL PASS — ZeRO-1/2/3 모두 single-rank Adam과 1e-7 이내 bit-level 일치, 메모리 계층 ZeRO-3 > ZeRO-2 > ZeRO-1 확인.

items.name: FSDP
items.summary: Weight shard 균등 분할 (fsdp_shard_begin/end/size) + all-gather full weight (fsdp_all_gather + fp16 variant) + reduce-scatter full gradient (fsdp_reduce_scatter) + fsdp_forward/backward (single-rank 동치) + CPU offload 라운드트립 (fsdp_offload_to_cpu/load_to_gpu) + mixed precision (fp16 compute + fp32 master shard) + wrap policy (layer threshold) + optimizer step (shard 업데이트) + memory savings (N/1.5x). 28 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Sequence Parallelism
items.summary: SPContext seq-split + all_gather/reduce_scatter seq collectives + sharded LayerNorm (local, row-wise) + deterministic per-rank LCG Dropout + SP+TP transformer block (LN -> all-gather -> TP attn -> reduce-scatter -> residual+dropout -> LN -> all-gather -> TP MLP -> reduce-scatter -> residual+dropout) + single-rank baseline numerical equivalence + sp_memory_saved_ratio (1-1/P) + activation bytes accounting. 22 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Tree of Thoughts
items.summary: Thought node(array) + tot_expand k-children (wrap) + heuristic(keyword+depth) + voting(deterministic subset) + BFS beam(topk selection sort) + DFS explicit-stack backtracking + combine_best(argmax score) + combine_majority(last-suffix) + tot_solve bfs/dfs×best/majority. 36 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Self-Consistency
items.summary: N-sample decoding with per-sample temperature softmax + categorical sample + logprob recording + answer normalization (lowercase/trim/collapse-ws/strip trailing '.') + sc_answers_equal + sc_majority_vote (count + confidence=count/N) + sc_weighted_majority (tie-break via exp(logprob - max), confidence=win_weight/total) + sc_decode (plain/weighted) + reproducible LCG-ish RNG (31-bit safe, BigInt 회피). 31 tests ALL PASS (T1~T16 covering softmax sums, one-hot temp=0, argmax, normalize cases, equivalence, categorical bounds, generate_samples triple, majority vote, confidence, weighted tie-break, decode plain/weighted, seed reproducibility, empty-input edge).

items.name: Contrastive Search
items.summary: cs_softmax (temp-guard + max-sub stability) + cs_top_k_indices (n·k selection, k>n clamp) + cs_cosine_sim + cs_degeneration_penalty (max cos-sim vs prev hidden states) + cs_token_score ((1-α)·p − α·pen, α∈[0,1] clamp) + deterministic cs_mock_logits / cs_mock_hidden (hash-based, reproducible) + cs_pick_next (top-k 후보 contrastive rank) + @contrastive_search contrastive_generate (per-step prev_hs append) + cs_repetition_rate 측정. 36 tests ALL PASS — α=0.7 rep_rate 0.7096 vs α=0 0.8387 (반복 12.9%p 감소), reproducible, k>vocab 안전 클램프.

items.name: RAG Pipeline
items.summary: Self-contained RAG pipeline on self/ml/rag_pipeline.hexa: chunk store (ids/texts/metas/vectors parallel arrays) + built-in byte-level mean-pool embedder (rp_embed) + top-k cosine retrieval (selection sort) + 3 prompt templates (default/concise/detailed) + LRU semantic cache (cache_queries/cache_responses/cache_order) + rag_query/rag_query_with_hook (echo/first_ctx/concat generator tags) + rag_add_document chunk-split + rag_update_chunk/rag_delete_chunk CRUD + rag_stats (hits/misses/hit_rate/size/retrievals) + rag_clear_cache + rag_reset_stats. 50 assertions across 19 test groups ALL PASS.

items.name: HNSW Vector Index
items.summary: self/ml/hnsw.hexa HNSW ANN pure-Hexa: multi-layer graph (M/M_max/M_max0=2M/efConstruction/efSearch/mL=1/ln(M)) + insert(xorshift+LCG deterministic level sampling, functional layer updates, back-edge pruning by distance) + search_layer beam (sorted cand+result lists) + search top-down descent with ef=1 to layer0 then efSearch beam + L2/cosine metrics + brute-force ground truth + hnsw_recall(). 21 tests ALL PASS (distance primitives, empty/single/multi insert, search correctness, top-k length, top1=brute-force match, sorted-by-distance, recall@5=1.0 on 40-pt random set both cosine+L2, level sampler bounds).

items.name: Cross-Encoder Rerank
items.summary: CrossEncoderModel(dim,vocab,embeddings,W,bias_h,score_head) + byte-tokenize [query [SEP] doc] + mean-pool -> W·h + softsign act + linear score head + score_pair/score_batch + rerank top_k selection sort + rerank_topk_reorder + batch_inference + eval_ndcg_at_k(DCG/IDCG with 2^rel-1, log2 discount) + eval_mrr(first-rel rank) + eval_rerank tuple. 27 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Linear Attention
items.summary: Performer FAVOR+ (trig/positive feature maps via Gaussian random projection + Box-Muller LCG) + O(N) KV outer-product accumulate (non-causal/causal streaming) + Linformer low-rank E/F sequence projection. Numerical approx: trig rel=0.085 pos rel=0.018 vs naive softmax (m=256). 16 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Multi-Token Prediction
items.summary: MTPConfig(vocab,hidden,n_heads) + MTPModel(shared backbone_w[hidden][vocab] + n parallel MTPHead w[vocab][hidden]/bias, LCG-seeded init) + mtp_backbone one-hot sum + softsign squash + mtp_head_logits linear + stable softmax/log_softmax + mtp_ce + mtp_loss (sum per-head CE) + mtp_loss_per_head + analytic SGD mtp_train_step (dL/db=softmax-onehot, immutable update returning [loss,model]) + mtp_predict_n argmax + mtp_inference_loop commit-n-per-pass decoding + mtp_speculative_verify draft/target accept-prefix hook (reuses speculative_decode semantics) + @multi_token_predict mtp_step wrapper returning [pred,loss_x100,accept]. 5-step training monotone-non-increasing, deterministic. 22 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Self-Rewarding LM
items.summary: self-prompt + LLM-as-judge 1..5 rubric (5 criteria, weighted norm [0,1]) + argmax/argmin DPO pair 생성 + iterative loop + quality delta/monotone + dpo.hexa/rlaif.hexa 재사용 + tokenizer bridge. 39 test assertions ALL PASS.

items.name: SelfCheckGPT
items.summary: N-sample consistency scoring (ngram+BLEU+char-histogram cosine) + per-sentence hallucination prob + Hoeffding-tail p-value + threshold flag. 23 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Conformal Prediction
items.summary: Split conformal (regression + classification) + finite-sample quantile ceil((n+1)(1-α))/n + nonconformity scores (|y-ŷ|, 1-p(y|x)) + prediction interval/set + empirical coverage validation + CP++ (weighted quantile for covariate shift, APS adaptive set, Jackknife+ LOO). Position-tracked insertion sort avoids HX3 pitfall. Synthetic N(0,1) cal/test demonstrates ≥85% coverage at α=0.1. 16 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Lean Tactic Integration
items.notes: tactic DSL(intro/apply/rewrite/induction/split/exact/assumption/contradiction) + propositional formula encoding + goal stack + proof state + proof tree + check_proof/verify_proof + modus ponens example. 50/50 PASS.

items.name: Code Sandbox Exec
items.summary: Map-based mini-lang interpreter (int/str lit, var, bin/un op, call, let/asn/if/while/ret) + AST allowlist (15 ops + 8 builtins, 기타 deny-by-default) + explicit cs_denied_call taxonomy (exec/read_file/write_file/http/env/exit/spawn) + step counter (cs_tick) + hard-cap timeout + cs_stdout_append buffer capture + CSResult (ok/err/timeout/denied) + deterministic execution (no external calls) + div-by-zero safe. 20 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Streaming Generation
items.summary: StreamChannel FIFO + high/low watermark backpressure + flow control (channel_push/try_push/pop) + cancel/close + subscriber fan-out (channel_notify) + StreamDecoder incremental detokenize + stream_generate producer loop with built-in drain. 14 test groups / 69 assertions ALL PASS.

items.name: MCTS Reasoning
items.summary: MCTS Reasoning (ML #71) — UCB1 selection + expansion + random rollout + backprop + root best-child on a single global MCTS_NODES store. Dispatched env backend (chain-world + tic-tac-toe) works around the interpreter's fn-parameter aliasing. 15 tests ALL PASS (including chain-world optimal action and tic-tac-toe immediate-loss blocking).

items.name: LoRA Hot-Swap
items.notes: registry load/unload/overwrite + session swap + request routing + concurrent serve + merge/unmerge round-trip + base copy-on-write 불변성 검증

items.name: Reflexion Loop
items.summary: Episodic memory map (actions/rewards/critiques/success) + pluggable verifier (tol) + dense reward 1/(1+|d|) + self-critique direction classifier (too_low/too_high/success) + agent_step with critique injection (step halves per iter) + rfx_run bounded loop with early exit + improvement_trend (avg delta reward) + success_iter + best_reward + rfx_summary one-liner. 21 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: DoLa Decoding
items.notes: mature vs premature layer projection + JSD-based premature selection + contrastive logit (log p_m - alpha*log p_p) + APC plausibility mask + hallucination suppression score + original-decode comparison

items.name: Speculative Tree Decoding
items.summary: Flat tree repr [n,tokens,parents,depths] + draft_top_k via hash salt perturbation + BFS tree_draft_generate(k,branch) + tree_attention_mask (ancestor-inclusive causal) + tree_verify (path-local target forward per node) + accept_longest_path (DP over parent_ok*accepted) + accepted_tokens/kv_merge + @speculative_tree_decode loop with forced-progress fallback. 30 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Constitutional AI
items.notes: 8 principles (tag/weight parallel arrays) + critique + revise + refine_once/iter + rlaif_hook + safety_score; 34/34 tests PASS

items.name: Soft Prompt Tuning
items.summary: [P x d] learned prompt embedding + frozen backbone (W,b) + task-specific pool (multi-task) + prepend + mean-pool last hidden for gradient coverage + SGD train step. 41 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Prefix Tuning
items.notes: layer-wise prefix K/V + reparam MLP (tanh) 안정화 + attention concat + backward (d_source/d_w1/d_b1/d_w2/d_b2) + SGD + determinism

items.name: BitNet 1.58bit
items.notes: absmean ternary quant + STE backward + matmul + 10x mem ratio (16/1.58). 16 tests / 49 checks PASS.

items.name: Online DPO
items.remaining: online sample → judge → DPO update + replay + 누적 정책
items.notes: 순수 .hexa 구현: sample→judge→pair→DPO 업데이트+replay buffer+L2/KL drift, 28 tests PASS

items.name: KTO Preference
items.summary: Pure-hexa KTO: desirable/undesirable 단일 라벨 loss, prospect-theory value function (lambda_D=1.0, lambda_U=1.33), batch-detached z_ref KL anchor (E[beta*(log pi - log pi_ref)]), lambda 비대칭 손실 + numerical head grad + SGD train loop. DPO 베이스 재사용 (kto_create_weights/copy/scratch/momentum). self/test_kto.hexa 31 tests PASS (sigmoid 안정·value 단조·프로스펙트 비대칭·z_ref 이동·혼합/단일 배치 집계·gradient 부호·빈 배치 경계).

items.name: Distributional RL
items.notes: C51 categorical DQN (atoms + softmax + expected Q + ε-greedy + projected Bellman + cross-entropy loss) + QR-DQN 대안 (quantile midpoints + Huber + quantile regression loss + bootstrap targets). 19/19 PASS.

items.name: World Model Dreamer
items.notes: latent encoder + transition model + reward/value/actor heads + imagination rollout(H) + lambda-return + actor-critic loss + numerical-gradient train step. 20/20 PASS.

items.name: ORPO
items.summary: SFT loss + odds ratio (P/(1-P)) + log odds ratio penalty + combined L_SFT+lambda*L_OR + reference-free single-stage + analytic gradient + batch/multi-step training + preference accuracy. 37 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Mamba SSM
items.summary: S6 selective state space: HiPPO A diagonal + ZOH discretization (A_bar=exp(delta*A), B_bar=delta*B) + input-dependent selection (delta/B/C from input via softplus/linear) + conv1d depthwise causal + recurrent mode (step-by-step h=A_bar*h+B_bar*x) + parallel scan (associative prefix sum) + full Mamba block (linear proj->conv1d->SiLU->SSM->gate->output proj+residual) + multi-layer stack + RMS norm. 30 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Token Merging
items.summary: Pairwise cosine similarity + bipartite matching + top-r merge (weighted avg) + unmerge + multi-layer + throughput tracker. 30 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: ReAct Agent
items.summary: Thought/action/observation loop + tool registry (register/lookup/list) + trace buffer (thoughts/observations/actions) + max_steps early termination + finish action + prompt formatting + parse thought/action (line + tag format) + run/run_simple orchestrators + trace stats/serialization. 51 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Curriculum Learning
items.summary: Difficulty scorer (loss/length/composite) + normalize (min-max) + pacing (linear/sqrt/exp/step) + competence tracker (val-loss EMA) + curriculum stages (easy/medium/hard) + filter_by_stage + filter_up_to_stage + batch sampler + anti-curriculum (hard-first) + staged train step + baby_step_pool. 48 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Vision Encoder
items.summary: ViT patch embed + learnable CLS token + 2D pos embed + L x (LayerNorm->MHSA->FFN) encoder + projection head to LLM space + image preprocess. 35 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Watermarking
items.summary: Green/red hash partition + logit bias (delta) + z-score detection + p-value threshold + sliding window robustness (edit/insert) + key management (keygen/fingerprint/rotate/multi-key) + configurable gamma + strength estimator + detect_robust combined. 35 tests ALL PASS.
